title: Mid Optimized
description: a minecraft mod pack aim to enhance your experience in minecraft with incredible optimization mods and fancy mods that add more life to your world or your server and make exploration more interesting.
body:
##  **Mid Optimized**
 a minecraft mod pack aim to enhance your experience in minecraft without getting out of our vanilla it include incredible optimization mods and fancy mods that add more life to your world or your server and make exploration more interesting by adding more **(Animations)**,**(Optfine Resource Pack)** Supporting , **better fps** optimization,**(Seasons)**,(**3D Animation & Visuals**),**Ambient Sounds** and more ..
_________________________________________________________________________________________________________
##  **🌿 Features**
- ✔️ **Performance Optimization** - better chunks loading , stable **fps optimization** , fast world quit.
- ✔️ **Optfine Resource Pack** - supporting **Optfine Resource Pack** including (**Connected Textures**) and more.
- ✔️ **More Structure & Dungeons** - adding more Structures & Dungeons without getting out of our vanilla.
- ✔️ **Built-in Shader & Resource Pack** - Customizable (**Shaders** , **Resource Pack**) that improve your experience with pre-included options.
- ✔️ **Quick & Compatible** - Works well on **Most Systems** and **Supports Multiplayer**.

_________________________________________________________________________________________________________


## **📜 Mods List**

<details>
<summary>click here to see the included mods</summary>

The list is actually large to include here (about 98).

If you click on a version in the versions tab it will show you all the mods under a dependencies list.
</details>

______________________________________________________________________________________________________
